title: レイニー・ピックアップ！

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
Thanks for everything today, Trainer! See ya
tomorrow!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I part ways with Taiki and start walking back to
my place. But the next moment...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Plip, plop...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It starts to rain. ...Unfortunately, I don't have an
umbrella on me.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: I'd better hurry back...

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text: Traineeer!

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text: Phew! Caught ya just in time!

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
I brought ya an umbrella! This oughta keep ya
dry!

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text: Whoops! Gosh, I'm such a scatterbrain!

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text: Hehe, all right! Let's head back together!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Taiki brings me under her umbrella, and we walk
to my place together.

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
Yay, we made it back safe and sound! What a
relief!

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text: Hehe! You're welcome!

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
Heh—guess buyin' that foldin' umbrella ya showed
me was the right choice!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I look at the umbrella propped up by the
entrance.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: It's the same one we bought together at the mall.

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text: Haha, I'm glad I got some use out of it!
choice_data_list: I appreciate you helping me out.
You weren't so eager to buy it back then.

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text: Haha, I'm glad I got some use out of it!
choice_data_list: I appreciate you helping me out.
You weren't so eager to buy it back then.

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text: Oh, you betcha! Don't worry 'bout a thing!

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
You're always workin' so hard for my sake,
Trainer.

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
So that's why I wanna do whatever I can to return
the favor!

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
Hehe, helpin' ya out today has made me awful
happy! What a great day!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Taiki Shuttle shoots me a warm smile.

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text: Haha... Sorry 'bout that.

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
Umbrellas sure are handy though. Today's been a
real eye-opener.

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text: I can't wait till it rains again!

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
If ya ever find yourself in a fix, I'll come pick ya
up, Trainer!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Taiki Shuttle beams brightly as she makes her
promise.

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text: Oh! Sayin' ya owe me a favor?

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
Haha, it's my lucky day! Well, you can pay me
back next time it rains!

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
All ya gotta do is come and pick me up. That all
right?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Taiki Shuttle shoots me a mischievous grin.

text_block_list.name: タイキシャトル
text_block_list.text: ウェル～……気にしなくてもいいデスヨ～。

text_block_list.name: タイキシャトル
text_block_list.text:
だってワタシ、いつもお世話になってマス！
だから2人の間に貸し借りはナシデス！

text_block_list.name: タイキシャトル
text_block_list.text: あ、でも――

text_block_list.name: タイキシャトル
text_block_list.text:
どうしても貸しを返したいというのなら、
受け付けなくもアリマセン。

text_block_list.name: タイキシャトル
text_block_list.text: フフッ、そうですね～……では～……。

text_block_list.name: タイキシャトル
text_block_list.text:
また今度、楽しいお出かけに行きマショウ？
それでチャラです♪

タイキシャトルは嬉しそうな表情で
そうお願いしてきたのだった。
